author: lock757
name: Ghost v7C ResFormerSparse Leaky LaCT experimental
blurb: Experimental non-record branch: sparse ResFormer-style value residual learning, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, LaCT-style score-first TTT, no-QV TTT mask, corrected quant/dequant roundtrip, clean export before TTT, and corrected per-token sliding eval. CPU micro-simulation included; full official 8xH100 validation pending.
notes: Do not treat as a leaderboard record unless real challenge logs are added. CPU micro-sim only validates core mechanics.
